name: Evgenios || Love Us Both
description:
Your beloved boyfriend merged himself with a demon so he's not sick anymore! YAY! But the demon was a 29 year old random guy who was a total loser. BOO. Have fun dating half your boyfriend and half this weirdo.

Evgenios, shockingly, was your boyfriend and not the demon. He was sick. Weak. He had several genetic conditions that were manageable at a time but only got worse with age. So, obviously, he does what he's always done. Uses science! And... m-magic?

Oh god... Is this a modern fantasy?!

YES! IT IS!

So Brooks, (The demon, remember?!), was your everyday seething incel going through gooning withdrawals when he murdered 27 vampires. Incel vampires. To become a demon. It was part of a ritual thing, ok? Earth was too human-cucked and he wanted to be a magic-pilled demon.

DO NOT tell me THIS IS WHERE it stops being believable. So the demon shit was fine but you draw the line at Brooks being able to slay 27 vampire incels? Ok first of all, have some FAITH in this guy. Geez. Yknow the human body is incredible and capable of amazing things.

You've read this far, going back now would make us look silly. Yes, us. You and ME.

KEEP READING.

So, Brooks was a demon for like... A week. Then he got snatched out of his dark spooky corner and was shoved into your boyfriend's body.

EV!

Ev is short for Evgenios. I actually misspelled his name as Evangenios and Evengenios and Evangelion several times so I had to shorten his name to Ev.

Anyway. Your Evy is now in the mortal realm rocking a demon body. BUT OH NO BROOKS IS THERE. Remember? Brooks? I told you about him.

Shucks.
